name: meta_rig_action
description: What to do with the meta rig after the full rigify rig has been generated. Keep leaves it visible and in the scene. Hide is the recommended default - it stays in the scene (so Rigify's in-place re-generation works and any action layers on it survive) but is hidden from the viewport and renders. Delete removes it entirely
label: Meta-rig
items: Keep the meta rig visible in the scene after generation
Keep the meta rig in the scene but hide it from the viewport and renders (recommended)
Delete the meta rig from the scene after generation
